title: jurinea eriobasis
intro: Jurinea eriobasis, also known as Siberian wormwood or Mongolian wormwood, is a type of plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Jurinea eriobasis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia. In herbal preparations, Jurinea eriobasis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also employed in traditional folk remedies to treat respiratory and skin conditions.
